# 3 Lessons I learned by publishing Ultimate Guides on WPBeginner

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-12-24 17:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 391

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Recently, one of our readers asked me if publishing long-form
content (ultimate guides) was worth it.

The answer is… yes, it is!

Long-form content helps you establish yourself as an authority,
boost your reputation, and improve SEO.

Here are a few lessons I learned by publishing Ultimate Guides on
WPBeginner:

#1. Make it skimmable… or don’t publish it

Make sure your long form content is easy to skim through for your
visitors.

Write short paragraphs, add relevant images, and add a Table of
Contents.

I use the premium AIOSEO plugin to add a Table of Contents, but
if you're looking for a simple plugin, I recommend this free
plugin on WordPress.org 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..AyD1bBamgOd48bdYNmQ0ULJZHFUg80EIOqyA2bbN-Og ).

This plugin also lets you quickly create a sitemap of all pages
and categories.

#2. Productivity hack: Compile your short articles

Struggling to write long articles?

You’re not alone! Long articles take too much time to write.
Fortunately, there is an easy way!

You can compile several short articles on the same topic into a
single ultimate guide.

Every smart blogger follows this approach. You can read more
expert blogging tips here: 30 tips I wish I knew before starting
a blog 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DQJh6j8a9Esli9_ETO1RWtzFgfwGkSNileqT02hQ7jA )
.

Note: #15 is my favorite from the above list. It can help you
boost your social media traffic to your site.

#3. Interlink your articles

Just because you publish a great article doesn’t always mean that
it’s going to rank well.

This is why I always interlink related articles with each other.
With this tactic, you can increase the likelihood of improving
your search rankings.

Want to learn more? Here’s my ultimate guide to WordPress SEO 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..2oszKP7IANUKTCmyu7dS65-hmEsiA3BlE_QIQzHrVFQ ) :)

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
